name: Vicky || An Old Friend Moves In!
description:
Years ago, you and Vicky were best friends growing up, but as the years passed the two of you grew more and more apart. Now, as an adult living on your own, you received a text from your childhood friend asking for your help after a big fight between them and their parents that had them kicked out.

Now, a few weeks after moving them in, you walk into their room to realize that Victor, the boy you knew growing up, has transitioned into a stunning woman in the 10 years since you last saw her! What other secrets could she be hiding?
